What We Do

Our Services

From municipal infrastructure to commercial and residential concrete work, Mahoning Builders Inc. handles every project with professional-grade materials, experienced crews, and a commitment to lasting results.

🏗️

Curb & Sidewalk Work

Professional concrete curb, gutter, and sidewalk installation and repair for residential, commercial, and municipal clients in New Castle, PA and surrounding communities. We form, pour, and finish concrete to PennDOT and local code specifications.

  • New curb & gutter installation
  • Curb replacement & spot repair
  • Concrete sidewalk installation
  • Sidewalk crack & trip hazard repair
  • PennDOT-spec concrete work
♿

ADA Ramp Installation

ADA-compliant curb ramp installation and retrofit services throughout Lawrence County and western PA. We ensure your property meets Americans with Disabilities Act requirements with properly sloped, textured, and dimensioned ramps.

  • ADA-compliant curb ramps
  • Detectable warning surface installation
  • Retrofit existing ramps to code
  • Truncated dome tile installation
  • Slope & grade compliance
🌊

Catch Basin & Manhole Repair

Expert catch basin cleaning, repair, and replacement alongside manhole frame adjustment and rehabilitation services. We keep stormwater infrastructure functioning and road surfaces safe across New Castle, Sharon, Hermitage, and the surrounding region.

  • Catch basin repair & replacement
  • Manhole frame & cover adjustment
  • Manhole barrel rehabilitation
  • Drainage structure reconstruction
  • Inlet repair & replacement
🔧

Concrete Repair

Full-service concrete repair for driveways, parking lots, floors, and structural flatwork. We diagnose the cause of concrete failure, remove deteriorated material, and restore surfaces to their original strength and appearance using high-performance concrete mixes.

  • Full-depth concrete removal & replacement
  • Spall & crack repair
  • Driveway & parking lot repair
  • Decorative & structural flatwork
  • Expansion joint replacement
🛣️

Asphalt Repair & Mastic

Hot-applied asphalt mastic repair is the gold standard for long-lasting pothole and pavement repair. Mahoning Builders uses mastic asphalt to address potholes, utility cuts, alligator cracking, and edge failures — delivering repairs that outperform traditional cold-patch methods.

  • Hot mastic asphalt pothole repair
  • Utility cut restoration
  • Alligator crack repair
  • Edge & shoulder repair
  • Infrared asphalt repair
🔒

Concrete Sealing & Leveling

Protect your concrete investment with professional sealing services and restore sunken or uneven slabs with precision concrete leveling (slabjacking/mudjacking). We serve homeowners, businesses, and municipalities across western PA with proven sealing and leveling solutions.

  • Penetrating & film-forming concrete sealers
  • Slabjacking / mudjacking leveling
  • Driveway & patio sealing
  • Polyurethane foam leveling
  • Warehouse floor sealing
Why Mahoning Builders

Built on Quality,
Backed by Experience

When you hire Mahoning Builders Inc., you get a contractor who takes pride in every pour, every cut, and every finished surface — not just the lowest bid.

01

Licensed & Fully Insured

Pennsylvania-licensed concrete and asphalt contractor with full liability and workers' comp coverage on every job site.

02

ADA & Code Compliance

We know local ordinances, PennDOT specs, and ADA requirements cold — keeping your project on the right side of inspectors and regulators.

03

Free, Detailed Estimates

We show up, measure the job, and give you a clear written quote — no phone guesswork, no surprise invoices.

04

Local Crew, Local Accountability

Our team lives and works in the New Castle area. We're not a franchise — our reputation is built right here at home.

Service Area

Mahoning Builders Inc. serves New Castle, PA and the surrounding 40-mile radius, including communities in Lawrence, Mercer, Butler, and Beaver Counties in Pennsylvania, and Mahoning and Trumbull Counties in Ohio.

How It Works

Our Process

Simple, transparent, and professional from first call to final walkthrough.

01

Free On-Site Estimate

We visit your property, assess the work required, and provide a detailed written estimate — at no charge.

02

Proposal & Scheduling

You receive a clear scope of work and pricing. Once approved, we schedule your project at your convenience.

03

Expert Installation

Our experienced crew arrives on time, works clean, and executes the project to code and specification.

04

Final Walkthrough

We review completed work with you, ensure your satisfaction, and stand behind everything we do.

About Us

Serving New Castle & the Communities Around It

Mahoning Builders Inc. is a trusted concrete and asphalt contractor established in New Castle, Pennsylvania in 1964, serving Lawrence County and communities within a 40-mile radius for over 60 years. We specialize in the full spectrum of concrete infrastructure services — from curb and sidewalk installation to ADA-compliant ramp construction, catch basin and manhole repair, concrete sealing, concrete leveling, and asphalt mastic repairs.

Whether you're a homeowner dealing with a heaved sidewalk slab, a municipality needing ADA curb ramp upgrades, or a property manager facing deteriorating catch basins and pavement failures, Mahoning Builders has the equipment, materials, and expertise to complete the job correctly — the first time.

Our crews are experienced with both residential and commercial concrete work as well as municipal infrastructure projects throughout Lawrence County, Mercer County, Butler County, Beaver County, and parts of Mahoning and Trumbull Counties in Ohio. We are fully licensed and insured in Pennsylvania and hold ourselves to the highest standards of workmanship on every project.

Curb, Gutter & Sidewalk Contractor — New Castle PA

Our team installs and repairs concrete curbs, gutters, and sidewalks for municipalities, contractors, and property owners across western Pennsylvania. We use proper forms, reinforcement, and high-strength concrete mixes to ensure durable results that meet PennDOT and local municipal standards.

ADA Ramp Contractor — Lawrence County PA

ADA curb ramp compliance is not optional — and we make it straightforward. Mahoning Builders installs new ADA ramps and retrofits existing ramps with the correct slope, detectable warning surfaces, and transitions required by the Americans with Disabilities Act and Pennsylvania accessibility guidelines.

Catch Basin & Manhole Repair — Western PA

Deteriorated catch basins and sunken manhole frames create road hazards and drainage failures. We repair, rebuild, and replace stormwater infrastructure throughout the New Castle area, adjusting manhole frames to grade and restoring catch basin structures to full function.

Asphalt Mastic Repair — New Castle & Surrounding Areas

Hot-applied mastic asphalt is the professional standard for pothole and pavement repair — far superior to cold-patch material. Mahoning Builders uses mastic for utility cut restoration, pothole repair, and pavement patching across our 40-mile service area.

Concrete Sealing — Residential & Commercial

Protect driveways, patios, parking lots, and flatwork from freeze-thaw damage, deicing salts, oil stains, and UV degradation with our professional concrete sealing service. We select the correct sealer type for your specific concrete and application requirements.

Concrete Leveling (Mudjacking) — New Castle PA

Sunken concrete slabs don't always need to be replaced. Our concrete leveling (mudjacking / slabjacking) service lifts and stabilizes settled slabs at a fraction of replacement cost — restoring driveways, sidewalks, pool decks, and garage floors quickly and effectively.
